Variables.Name: bUseGrid
Variables.Description: If true, use a jittered grid sequence for placement, otherwise use a halton sequence.

Variables.Name: StartCullDistance
Variables.Description: The distance where instances will begin to fade out if using a PerInstanceFadeAmount material node. 0 disables.

Variables.Name: EndCullDistance
Variables.Description:
The distance where instances will have completely faded out when using a PerInstanceFadeAmount material node. 0 disables. 
	  When the entire cluster is beyond this distance, the cluster is completely culled and not rendered at all.

Variables.Name: MinLOD
Variables.Description:
Specifies the smallest LOD that will be used for this component.
	  If -1 (default), the MinLOD of the static mesh asset will be used instead.

Variables.Name: ScaleX
Variables.Description: Specifies the range of scale, from minimum to maximum, to apply to a grass instance's X Scale property

Variables.Name: ScaleY
Variables.Description: Specifies the range of scale, from minimum to maximum, to apply to a grass instance's Y Scale property

Variables.Name: ScaleZ
Variables.Description: Specifies the range of scale, from minimum to maximum, to apply to a grass instance's Z Scale property

Variables.Name: RandomRotation
Variables.Description: Whether the grass instances should be placed at random rotation (true) or all at the same rotation (false)

Variables.Name: AlignToSurface
Variables.Description: Whether the grass instances should be tilted to the normal of the landscape (true), or always vertical (false)

Variables.Name: bUseLandscapeLightmap
Variables.Description: Whether to use the landscape's lightmap when rendering the grass.

Variables.Name: LightingChannels
Variables.Description:
Lighting channels that the grass will be assigned. Lights with matching channels will affect the grass.
	  These channels only apply to opaque materials, direct lighting, and dynamic lighting and shadowing.

Variables.Name: bReceivesDecals
Variables.Description: Whether the grass instances should receive decals.
